title: Be able to select multiple countries in the 'Country' column
excerpt: Be able to select multiple countries in the ‘Country’ column

posts.author: laogreen (Lars  Østergaard)
posts.cookedHtml: Be able to select multiple countries in the ‘Country’ column

posts.author: laurajane (Laura Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, me too! We really need to be able to do this. And it would also be great to have an EU flag and a “Global” option in the same column so we can track different types of content.
